note: Bundled snapshot fallback. The skill fetches the live catalogue first; this is used only if the live fetch fails.

skills.title: Agent Card

skills.title: Family Inbox Triage

skills.description: Read everything the school sends and turn it into clear actions, dates, and reminders.

skills.title: Family Correspondence
skills.description: Draft the routine messages, RSVPs, thank-yous, school notes, in your voice.

skills.title: Household SOP
skills.description: Capture how your home actually runs, so anyone (or your AI) can keep it going.

skills.title: OS Activity Review (the cockpit)
skills.description: Turns your OS's own logs into an honest cockpit: what ran, drafts versus sent, approvals, declines, stalls, escalations, and estimated time saved.

skills.title: OS Self-Improvement
skills.description: The periodic improvement loop: reviews real usage, your feedback, and fresh research on the department's cadence, then proposes evidence-backed skill improvements you approve. Supersedes AI Performance Review.

skills.title: Notion Brain Setup
skills.description: Wires your OS to your own Notion workspace: duplicates the DFY brain databases, maps each memory and log file to its database, migrates with approval, no lock-in.

skills.title: Lead Qualification
skills.description: Score a lead against your ideal-customer fit, recommend qualify or a gracious decline.

skills.title: Fast Inbound Response
skills.description: Surface a new enquiry fast and draft a warm, helpful first reply while the lead is hot.

skills.title: Discovery Call Prep
skills.description: Research the prospect and draft consultative, open questions and a clear call goal.

skills.title: Pre-Call Confidence Primer
skills.description: A 60-second reframe and the three things to remember before a sales conversation.

skills.title: Call Capture to Next Steps
skills.description: Turn call notes or a transcript into clean notes, a pipeline update, and a clear next step.

skills.title: Proposal Builder
skills.description: Draft a same-day, on-brand proposal from the call: scope, value, and honest pricing.

skills.title: Objection Handling Coach
skills.description: Find the real concern under an objection and answer it honestly, never defensively.

skills.title: Pricing Confidence Coach
skills.description: Set and hold a fair price, articulate value, and respond to discount requests without caving.

skills.title: Follow-Up Guardian
skills.description: Watch every open deal, surface who needs a nudge today, and draft a warm, no-pressure message.

skills.title: Follow-Up Sequence Writer
skills.description: Write a multi-touch follow-up that adds value each time and never uses fake urgency.

skills.title: Re-Engage Dormant Leads
skills.description: Surface dormant enquiries and past clients and draft a soft, value-first reopener.

skills.title: Referral and Warm-Intro Asker
skills.description: Spot the right moment and draft a specific, easy-to-say-yes-to referral request.

skills.title: Pipeline Review
skills.description: A weekly read of your pipeline that names the few deals to focus on and the one action each needs.

skills.title: Win-Loss Reflection
skills.description: After a deal closes or dies, a short reflection that extracts the lesson and updates your playbook.

skills.title: Post-Sale Handoff
skills.description: When you win, start the relationship well and kick off onboarding so the seam is seamless.

skills.title: Internal Selling (Influence Without Authority)
skills.description: For professionals: win internal buy-in by building the case, mapping stakeholders, and proposing a pilot.

skills.title: Slack and Teams Setup
skills.description: Wire your OS to your own Slack or Teams: DFY channel structure, the OS posting briefs and drafts, and in-channel approval by a named human before anything ships.
